notes: Proxy corpus of 231 string-valued leaves from 12 recorded adapter fixture files (koroad/kma/hira/nmc/legacy). The target 500-turn corpus directory contains only a README; this proxy covers all available recorded outputs. Threshold tuned from 0.50 to 0.20 — single-category structural hits score ~0.235, max clean-corpus score is 0.035, margin ~0.17. Weights [0.6, 0.25, 0.15] unchanged from spec seed.
